entry.title: IDC HSTS0108DHRM010 (P00099) awarded to LOCKHEED MARTIN INTEGRATED SYSTEMS, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
THE PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION P00099 TO THE HRACCESS IDIQ CONTRACT HSTS01-08-D-HRM010 IS TO INCORPORATE AND EXERCISE SUB-CLINS AND PERFORM OTHER ADMINISTRATIVE ACTIONS.
THE CONTRACT IS HEREBY MODIFIED ACCORDINGLY:
14(A) INCORPORATE AND EXERCISE SUB-CLIN 5002C "RECRUITMENT ACTIVITIES - MEDIA LABOR (COST ONLY)."
14(B) RENAME SUB-CLIN 5015AC "SF-52&BENEFITS PROCESSING (PASS)" TO 5015AC "SF-52&BENEFITS PROCESSING (TOPS)". THE QUANTITY OF TRANSACTIONS FOR CLIN 5015AC IS HEREBY REDUCED FROM 92,000 TO 40,000.
14(C) EXERCISE SUB-CLIN 5015AC FOR A QUANTITY OF 16,000 TRANSACTIONS.
14(D) INCORPORATE AND EXERCISE SUB-CLIN 5015AC-1 "SF-52&BENEFITS PROCESSING (TOPS) 16,001 - 40,000" FOR A QUANTITY OF 24,000 TRANSACTIONS.
14(E) MODIFICATION P00009 WILL BE MADE TO THE OY 4 TASK ORDER HSTS01-13-J-HRM022 TO RE-ALLOCATE UNEXPENDED FUNDING OF $1,257,371.63 FROM CLIN 5022 "TRAVEL" AND SUB-CLIN 5022A "TRAVEL" TO SUB-CLINS 5002C, 5015AC, AND 5015AC-1.
ALL OTHER TERMS AND CONDITIONS OF THE SUBJECT CONTRACT REMAIN UNCHANGED AND IN FULL FORCE AND EFFECT UNLESS OTHERWISE CHANGED BY THE HRACCESS CONTRACTING OFFICER (CO).

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: HUMAN RESOURCES CONSULTING SERVICES (2007), HUMAN RESOURCES AND EXECUTIVE SEARCH CONSULTING SERVICES (2002)

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC HSTS0108DHRM010 (P00100) awarded to LOCKHEED MARTIN INTEGRATED SYSTEMS, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION P00100 TO THE HRACCESS INDEFINITE DELIVERY INDEFINITE QUANTITY (IDIQ) CONTRACT (HSTS01-08-D-HRM010) IS TO INCORPORATE AND EXERCISE SUB-CLIN 5015AC-2 "SF-52&BENEFITS PROCESSING (TSP) QUANTITIES OF 40,001 - 75,000" TO ADD AN ADDITIONAL 35,000 TOPS TRANSACTIONS.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: HUMAN RESOURCES CONSULTING SERVICES (2007), HUMAN RESOURCES AND EXECUTIVE SEARCH CONSULTING SERVICES (2002)

entry.title: IDC HSTS0108DHRM010 (P00101) awarded to LOCKHEED MARTIN INTEGRATED SYSTEMS, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
THE PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION P00101 TO THE HRACCESS IDIQ CONTRACT HSTS01-08-D-HRM010 IS TO INCORPORATE AND EXERCISE A SUB-CLIN AND PERFORM OTHER ADMINISTRATIVE ACTIONS.
THE CONTRACT IS HEREBY MODIFIED ACCORDINGLY:
14A) EXTEND THE PERIOD OF PERFORMANCE (POP) OF SUB-CLIN 5009AB "FAMS J-BAND". THE POP IS HEREBY REVISED FROM 1/2/13 - 1/1/14 TO 1/2/13 - 3/1/14.
14B) INCREASE THE CEILING OF SUB-CLIN 5009AB "FAMS J-BAND" BY $64,805.50 FROM $614,568.00 TO $679,373.50.
14C) INCORPORATE AND EXERCISE SUB-CLIN 5009AB-2 "FAMS J-BAND AUTOMATION(COST ONLY)" FOR ADMINISTRATIVE PURPOSES. THIS NEWLY CREATED SUB-CLIN WILL SERVE TO EXTEND THE POP AT COST ONLY OF $64,805.50. THE POP FOR THIS SUB-CLIN WILL BE 1/2/14 - 3/1/14."
14D) EXTEND THE POP OF SUB-CLIN 4009AB "FAMS J-BAND" FROM 12/31/13 TO 1/31/14 AT NO ADDITIONAL COST TO THE GOVERNMENT. THE POP OF SUB-CLIN 4009AB IS HEREBY REVISED FROM 8/1/12 - 12/31/13 TO 8/1/12 - 1/31/14.
14E)MODIFICATION P00012 WILL BE MADE TO TASK ORDER HSTS01-13-J-HRM022 TO EXERCISE AND FULLY FUND SUB-CLIN 5009AB-2 IN THE NTE COST ONLY AMOUNT OF $64,805.50.
14F) MODIFICATION P00030 WILL BE MADE TO TASK ORDER HSTS01-12-J-HRM040 TO EXTEND THE POP OF SUB-CLIN 4009AB AT NO ADDITIONAL COST TO THE GOVERNMENT.
ALL OTHER TERMS AND CONDITIONS OF THE SUBJECT CONTRACT REMAIN UNCHANGED AND IN FULL FORCE AND EFFECT UNLESS OTHERWISE CHANGED BY THE HRACCESS CONTRACTING OFFICER.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: HUMAN RESOURCES CONSULTING SERVICES (2007), HUMAN RESOURCES AND EXECUTIVE SEARCH CONSULTING SERVICES (2002)

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC HSTS0108DHRM010 (P00102) awarded to LOCKHEED MARTIN INTEGRATED SYSTEMS, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
THE PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION P00102 TO THE HRACCESS IDIQ CONTRACT HSTS01-08-D-HRM010 IS TO INCORPORATE AND EXERCISE SUB-CLINS AND PERFORM OTHER ADMINISTRATIVE ACTIONS.
THE CONTRACT IS HEREBY MODIFIED ACCORDINGLY:
14A) INCORPORATE AND EXERCISE SUB-CLIN 5016AC "PAYROLL ACTION PROCESSING AND AFGE RESEARCH" FOR A QUANTITY OF 25,627 TRANSACTIONS IN TOTAL;
14B) INCORPORATE AND EXERCISE SUB-CLIN 5016AD "PAYROLL ACTION PROCESSING (EPMP)" FOR A QUANTITY OF 10,000 TRANSACTIONS IN TOTAL;
14C) EXTEND THE POP OF CLIN 5024 "DATA WAREHOUSE" AT NO ADDITIONAL COST TO THE GOVERNMENT. UNEXPENDED FUNDING FROM CLIN 5024 IN THE AMOUNT NOT-TO-EXCEED $256,191.40 WILL BE UTILIZED TO COVER THIS EXTENSION. CLAUSE I.3 LIMITATION OF COST AND I.4 LIMITATION OF FUNDS APPLY.
14D) THE POP OF CLIN 5024 IS HEREBY REVISED FROM 9/25/13 - 1/1/14 TO 9/25/13 - 1/13/14.
14E) MODIFICATION P00013 WILL BE MADE TO THE OY 4 TASK ORDER HSTS01-13-J-HRM022 TO FULLY FUND SUB-CLINS EXERCISED IN THIS MODIFICATION AT A TOTAL VALUE OF $1,356,676.00 AND REVISE THE POP OF CLIN 5024 AT NO ADDITIONAL COST TO THE GOVERNMENT.
ALL OTHER TERMS AND CONDITIONS OF THE SUBJECT CONTRACT REMAIN UNCHANGED AND IN FULL FORCE AND EFFECT UNLESS OTHERWISE CHANGED BY THE HRACCESS CONTRACTING OFFICER.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION P00104 IS TO EXERCISE CLIN 5015AB. THIS MODIFICATION IS AN ADMINISTRATIVE NECESSITY AS THIS IS AN IDIQ CLIN INCLUDED AT AWARD.

entry.title: IDC HSTS0108DHRM010 (P00105) awarded to LOCKHEED MARTIN INTEGRATED SYSTEMS, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
THE PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION P00105 TO THE HRACCESS IDIQ CONTRACT HSTS01-08-D-HRM010 IS TO EXTEND IDW O&M SERVICES PROVIDED BY LOCKHEED MARTIN THROUGH 1/31/14.
THE CONTRACT IS HEREBY MODIFIED ACCORDINGLY:
14A) EXTEND THE POP OF CLIN 5024 "DATA WAREHOUSE" AT NO ADDITIONAL COST TO THE GOVERNMENT FROM 1/13/14 TO 1/24/14. UNEXPENDED FUNDING ON CLIN 5024 WILL BE UTILIZED TO COVER PERFORMANCE RELATED TO LABOR THROUGH 1/24/14. THE POP OF CLIN 5024 IS HEREBY REVISED FROM 9/25/13 - 1/13/14 TO 9/25/13 - 1/24/14. CLAUSE I.3 LIMITATION OF COST AND I.4 LIMITATION OF FUNDS APPLY.
14B) INCORPORATE AND EXERCISE SUB-CLIN 5024A "DATA WAREHOUSE - JANUARY 2014 EXTENSION" AT A VALUE OF $941,888.18(COST: $856,261.98; FIXED FEE: $85,626.20). THE PERIOD OF PERFORMANCE (POP) OF THIS SUB-CLIN SHALL BE 1/14/14 - 1/31/14. THE PURPOSE OF THIS NEWLY CREATED AND EXERCISED SUB-CLIN IS TO FUND PERFORMANCE RELATED TO THE JANUARY BOM PURCHASE AND LABOR FROM 1/25/14 - 1/31/14;
14C) MODIFICATION P00016 WILL BE MADE TO THE OY 4 TASK ORDER HSTS01-13-J-HRM022 TO EXECUTE THE ACTIONS DESCRIBED HEREIN.
14D) SCHEDULE B "SUPPLIES OR SERVICES AND PRICE/COSTS" OF THE HRACCESS IDIQ CONTRACT HSTS01-08-D-HRM010 WILL BE REVISED ACCORDINGLY.
ALL OTHER TERMS AND CONDITIONS OF THE SUBJECT CONTRACT REMAIN UNCHANGED AND IN FULL FORCE AND EFFECT UNLESS OTHERWISE CHANGED BY THE HRACCESS CONTRACTING OFFICER.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.
